persistentElement.name: growth pulse
persistentElement.role: viewer-tracked signal showing where resources are becoming plant growth

transitions.surprise: The activation pulse exits the cracked seed and becomes the first visible root uptake pulse.
transitions.outgoingState: The pulse sits at the new root tip below the seed.
transitions.bridgeAction: The pulse travels downward through the root path as the frame deepens into soil.
transitions.incomingState: The pulse lands on the taproot where water and minerals begin entering.
transitions.compositionShift: Centered seed cutaway becomes vertical root flow spine.
transitions.colorShift: Warm activation yellow gains blue and purple resource companions.
transitions.spaceShift: Seed interior gives way to root-zone soil.
validationChecks: growth pulse appears on both sides

transitions.surprise: The upward water stream pulls the camera above the soil line into the shoot.
transitions.outgoingState: Particles flow upward through the root spine.
transitions.bridgeAction: The stream continues past the soil boundary and becomes a green shoot pulse.
transitions.incomingState: The pulse rides the rising shoot toward the light rays.
transitions.compositionShift: Vertical root spine becomes diagonal upward armature.
transitions.colorShift: Blue intake stream hands off to green shoot growth.
transitions.spaceShift: Underground soil becomes open air above the soil line.
validationChecks: upward flow direction survives the cut
shoot appears from the same soil baseline

transitions.surprise: The camera dives into one opened leaf and reveals it as a conversion chamber.
transitions.outgoingState: The leaf has intercepted light rays.
transitions.bridgeAction: A leaf surface expands until veins fill the frame.
transitions.incomingState: The large leaf receives light, CO2, and water as separate inputs.
transitions.compositionShift: Diagonal growth armature becomes asymmetric leaf chamber.
transitions.colorShift: Green leaf surface keeps identity while yellow, blue, and neutral air particles appear.
transitions.cameraShift: Zoom into the leaf, then settle on the conversion view.
transitions.spaceShift: Whole plant becomes a leaf-level close-up.
validationChecks: leaf identity is preserved through the zoom
inputs appear only after the chamber lands

transitions.surprise: The sugars stream stretches into phloem routes that point at growing tips.
transitions.outgoingState: Sugars leave the leaf veins as purple packets.
transitions.bridgeAction: The packets align into purple transport lines while blue water lines separate upward.
transitions.incomingState: The lines feed the shoot and root cell panels.
transitions.compositionShift: Leaf close-up becomes full plant plus magnified growth zones.
transitions.colorShift: Purple remains sugar/phloem; blue remains water/xylem.
transitions.cameraShift: Pull back from leaf to whole plant.
transitions.spaceShift: Leaf interior becomes plant-wide transport map.
validationChecks: xylem and phloem are separate after the pullback

transitions.surprise: A growth-zone pulse becomes the first seed packet on the lifecycle ring.
transitions.outgoingState: New cell tiles pulse at the growing tips.
transitions.bridgeAction: The strongest pulse detaches and arcs around the mature plant.
transitions.incomingState: The pulse lands on the seed node and starts the circular return.
transitions.compositionShift: Plant plus magnifiers becomes radial lifecycle.
transitions.colorShift: Growth green stays as plant tissue; seed yellow returns as continuation state.
transitions.cameraShift: Small pullback to fit the full ring.
transitions.spaceShift: Plant-scale growth map becomes lifecycle map.
validationChecks: cycle ring grows from a real growth-zone pulse
final attention lands on seed node
